name: ubidots
description: Reads Ubidots devices, variables, variable values, device groups, device types, dashboards, and events, and writes device/variable lifecycle mutations and new variable data points through API v2.0.

risk.read: external Ubidots API read of device, variable, variable-value, device-group, device-type, dashboard, and event data
risk.write: external mutation of Ubidots devices and variables (create/update/delete) and injection of new variable data points; device/variable delete is destructive and irreversible
risk.approval: required for delete_device/delete_variable; other writes are low-risk external mutations
